import org.slf4j.Logger;

// JV008 negative: a recognized tier-1 sink whose only stop-words live in string
// literals. A literal is prose, not a value carrier, so nothing leaks - no
// finding, on a real error/warn sink.
class Jv008CleanLiteral {
    private final Logger log;

    Jv008CleanLiteral(Logger log) {
        this.log = log;
    }

    void tokenWordInLiteralIsClean(Exception e) {
        log.error("token refresh failed", e);
    }

    void secretWordInFormatLiteralIsClean(Exception e, String userId) {
        log.error(String.format("password check for user %s", userId), e);
    }
}
